TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Brandon Bass hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 4, Brandon Bass, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Brandon Bass htagan beh Baton Rouge, Louisiana.hiya ga cyux qutux qsuyan mlikuy ru qutux qsuyan kneril. Chris ru Dashia lalu nya. aring cipoq ga yaya nya mlahang hiya. trang mopuw kawas nya,kyapung yaqah na nbu yaya nya wal mhuqil la. tehok mopuw cyugal kawas lga,hiya ga aring sakang mzyu mari pspung. Bass sswe mlikuy lalu Chris nya maki Louisiana hopa pqwasan biru mzyu mari. hiya ga maki qutux mlikuy laqi Brandon Jr. lalu nya.maki qutux kneril laqi,Bella lalu nya. Brandon Bass ru Melissa Prejean wal kekong la. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga pqwsan biru krahu cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βran*on βas~ɕs~ɕ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βran*on βas~ɕs~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja βran*on βas~ɕs~ɕ ħtaɣan βeħ βaton rouɣe, louis~ɕiana.ħija ɣa ʦ~ʨjux qutux qs~ɕujan mlikuj ru qutux qs~ɕujan kneril. ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ ru *as~ɕħia lalu nja. ariŋ ʦ~ʨipoq ɣa jaja nja mlaħaŋ ħija. traŋ mopuw kawas~ɕ nja,kjapuŋ jaqaħ na nβu jaja nja wal mħuqil la. teħok mopuw ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ lɣa,ħija ɣa ariŋ s~ɕakaŋ mzju mari ps~ɕpuŋ. βas~ɕs~ɕ s~ɕs~ɕwe mlikuj lalu ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ nja maki louis~ɕiana ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru mzju mari. ħija ɣa maki qutux mlikuj laqi βran*on *r. lalu nja.maki qutux kneril laqi,βella lalu nja. βran*on βas~ɕs~ɕ ru melis~ɕs~ɕa prejean wal kekoŋ la. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Brandon Bass hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 4, Brandon Bass, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Brandon Bass htagan beh Baton Rouge, Louisiana.hiya ga cyux qutux qsuyan mlikuy ru qutux qsuyan kneril. Chris ru Dashia lalu nya. aring cipoq ga yaya nya mlahang hiya. trang mopuw kawas nya,kyapung yaqah na nbu yaya nya wal mhuqil la. tehok mopuw cyugal kawas lga,hiya ga aring sakang mzyu mari pspung. Bass sswe mlikuy lalu Chris nya maki Louisiana hopa pqwasan biru mzyu mari. hiya ga maki qutux mlikuy laqi Brandon Jr. lalu nya.maki qutux kneril laqi,Bella lalu nya. Brandon Bass ru Melissa Prejean wal kekong la. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga pqwsan biru krahu cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βran*on βas~ɕs~ɕ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βran*on βas~ɕs~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja βran*on βas~ɕs~ɕ ħtaɣan βeħ βaton rouɣe, louis~ɕiana.ħija ɣa ʦ~ʨjux qutux qs~ɕujan mlikuj ru qutux qs~ɕujan kneril. ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ ru *as~ɕħia lalu nja. ariŋ ʦ~ʨipoq ɣa jaja nja mlaħaŋ ħija. traŋ mopuw kawas~ɕ nja,kjapuŋ jaqaħ na nβu jaja nja wal mħuqil la. teħok mopuw ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ lɣa,ħija ɣa ariŋ s~ɕakaŋ mzju mari ps~ɕpuŋ. βas~ɕs~ɕ s~ɕs~ɕwe mlikuj lalu ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ nja maki louis~ɕiana ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru mzju mari. ħija ɣa maki qutux mlikuj laqi βran*on *r. lalu nja.maki qutux kneril laqi,βella lalu nja. βran*on βas~ɕs~ɕ ru melis~ɕs~ɕa prejean wal kekoŋ la. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
